info.title: a2a-ask
info.description: A2A-Ask: Interact with A2A (Agent-to-Agent) protocol agents from the command line

commands.name: discover
commands.description: Fetch and display an A2A agent card

options.name: --extended
options.description: Fetch the extended (authenticated) agent card [default: False]

arguments.name: URL
arguments.description: Base URL of the agent (or direct agent card URL)

commands.name: send
commands.description: Send a message to an A2A agent

options.name: --file
options.description: File to include as a message part

options.name: --data
options.description: Structured JSON data to include as a message part

options.name: --task-id
options.description: Task ID for continuing an existing task

options.name: --context-id
options.description: Context ID for grouping related interactions

options.name: --message-id
options.description: Custom message ID (defaults to auto-generated UUID)

options.name: --return-immediately
options.description: Return immediately without waiting for task completion [default: False]

options.name: --history-length
options.description: Maximum number of history messages to include in response

options.name: --api-key-header
options.description: API key header name (defaults to agent card setting)

options.name: --client-id
options.description: OAuth2 client ID for client_credentials grant

options.name: --client-secret
options.description: OAuth2 client secret for client_credentials grant

options.name: --binding
options.description: Protocol binding: auto, http, jsonrpc [default: auto]

options.name: --save-artifacts
options.description: Directory to save file artifacts to disk

commands.name: stream
commands.description: Send a message with streaming response, or subscribe to task events

options.name: --file
options.description: File to include as a message part

options.name: --subscribe
options.description: Subscribe to an existing task's events (requires --task-id) [default: False]

options.name: --task-id
options.description: Task ID for continuing an existing task

options.name: --context-id
options.description: Context ID for grouping related interactions

options.name: --api-key-header
options.description: API key header name (defaults to agent card setting)

options.name: --client-id
options.description: OAuth2 client ID for client_credentials grant

options.name: --client-secret
options.description: OAuth2 client secret for client_credentials grant

options.name: --save-artifacts
options.description: Directory to save file artifacts to disk

commands.name: get
commands.description: Get the current state of a task

options.name: --api-key-header
options.description: API key header name (defaults to agent card setting)

options.name: --api-key-header
options.description: API key header name (defaults to agent card setting)

options.name: --api-key-header
options.description: API key header name (defaults to agent card setting)

commands.name: login
commands.description: Interactively authenticate with an A2A agent

options.name: --client-id
options.description: OAuth2 client ID for client_credentials grant

options.name: --client-secret
options.description: OAuth2 client secret for client_credentials grant

arguments.name: URL
arguments.description: Agent base URL to authenticate against

commands.name: logout
commands.description: Remove stored authentication token for an agent

arguments.name: URL
arguments.description: Agent URL to remove stored token for

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show authentication status for an agent

arguments.name: URL
arguments.description: Agent URL to check authentication status for
